question.text:
Dear Nick Zong 

 

Sorry for suddenly email request. 

 

Ms An limeng is our JP side Fin, in future JP side agency Benline will work under CUL JP (KAIWA SHIPPING) or not only Benline with CUL PTE . 

 

So, we need to open Ms An limeng’s below factions. 

 

Best Regards,

Andrew Xu / 徐鲁宁

Owner’s Chief Representative

TH Mobile:+66-095-976-6630

CH Mobile:+86-136-1291-5767

JP Mobile:+81-070-6529-0053 

Web: www.culines.com/ <http://www.culines.com/>  

7F, Mayapada Shiodome Plaza, 2-11-4 

Higashi-Shinbashi, Minato-ku, Tokyo

20th Floor Lumpini Tower, Rama 4 Road,

Thungmahamek, Sathorn, Bangkok 10120



 


日期: 2026年3月27日 星期五 12:00
收件人: Limeng An/CUL-JP/FIN&HR <jp.limengan@culines.com>, #CUL Allegro

answer.text:
Dear Limeng,

The MIS Invoice access is not user-specific but is managed at the invoice office level. Please contact the HQ FIN team to request this access.

The rest of the requested permissions have been enabled. Please check, thanks!


Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Friday, March 27, 2026 at 16:06

Cc: Doris Huang/CUL-TPE/FIN&HR <tw.dorishuang@culines.com>, Cathy
